examples: The flute is the best coloratura soprano without doubt.
Its pure coloratura sparkled through her early arias, drawing bursts of applause.
This classic piece features a duet between a coloratura soprano and and a mezzo-soprano.
The role of Violetta requires a bigger, warmer voice and more dramatic inflection than this petite coloratura soprano can muster, despite her obvious gifts as an actress.
The role of the demimondaine Violetta requires a bigger, warmer voice and more dramatic inflection than this petite coloratura soprano can muster, despite her obvious gifts as an actress.
